  as={"h1"}

</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/onboarding/{product}/review"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



    Gets onboarding review for a product in the Account.

    ### Permissions
    * `business:read`
